Localization.Description: A user accessed the LSASS process memory. After connecting the corresponding utility (such as Mimikatz) to the RPC server and gaining access to the LSASS process memory, attackers can save this memory in a separate file to later extract passwords and NTLM hashes from it.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user connected utility {subject.process.name} to the RPC server from host {src.host} and accessed the LSASS process memory on host {event_src.host}
